title: Trump administration lifts export controls on Anthropic's most powerful AI models, ending bitter standoff
description: The Trump administration lifted emergency export controls on Anthropic’s most advanced artificial intelligence models on Tuesday night, according to Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick -- abruptly ending a bitter standoff that disrupted the global tech sector.

title: In 2023, scientists scanned a charred Herculaneum scroll and reopened a library buried by Vesuvius
description: Science News: In a groundbreaking achievement, scientists have utilized high-resolution X-ray scans and artificial intelligence to decode the carbonized scrolls from the Herculaneum library, buried by Mount Vesuvius nearly two thousand years ago. This revelation brings ancient philosophical texts back to life.
content:
Heruclaneum Papyrus 1521, British Library. image credit: wikimedia commons

title: Jim Cramer says the AI trade has shifted - and these stocks are leading now

content:

title: Many Analysts Expected AI To Replace Workers. New Company Data Tells A Different Story.

title: AI needs a nurse: Why nurses' input is vital in preserving patient-centered care
